summary: Benzoin/Stetter anti-greed guards to resolve post-3g-3 greed migration (Aldol demoted → Benzoin/Stetter captured top1 on Petasis_1141 / Ugi_1346 / Passerini_1126-1127). Penalize isocyanide (→ Ugi/Passerini) and boron+amine|ammonia (→ Petasis) for own-family 'Benzoin and Retro-Benzoin Condensation' and 'Stetter Reaction'. DB-probed all 10 own-family rows clean (iso=0, bor=0, amn=0) so guards only penalize incorrect top1 misses, never real rows.

change_lines.benzoin_anti_greed: elif 'benzoin' in fam and 'condensation' in fam — penalize isocyanide 0.45, boron+(amine|ammonia) 0.55
change_lines.stetter_anti_greed: elif fam == 'stetter reaction' or fam.startswith('stetter reaction') — penalize isocyanide 0.45, boron+(amine|ammonia) 0.55

strict_non_regression_status: PASS — all 9 metrics >= 3g-3 baseline; 4 improved (adm_top1, confused, brd_top1, cov_r1), 5 unchanged, 0 regressed
diagnostic_journey: Post-3g-3 per-family audit: 'greed migration' — Aldol anti-greed demoted Aldol but Benzoin/Retro-Benzoin took top1 on Petasis_1141/1146/Ugi_1345/1346 and Stetter took top1 on Passerini_1126/1127.
DB probe (probe_3g_4_rows.py) confirmed all 6 Benzoin + 4 Stetter rows have iso=0, bor=0, amn=0 — penalties never fire on real rows, only on mis-matched MCR queries.
Wrote 3g-4 penalty block: Benzoin+Condensation guard + Stetter (exact match or startswith) guard, each penalizing isocyanide 0.45 or boron+(amine|ammonia) 0.55.
Smoke test (7 checks) all PASS: real Benzoin/Stetter no-op (mult=1.0); Ugi/Passerini/Petasis SMILES misclassified as Benzoin or Stetter now fire penalty ≤0.55.
Per-case diff count_hits_4.py: Petasis_1141 → Benzoin demoted, Petasis captured top1 across all 3 buckets (adm/brd/cov r@1). Ugi_1346 → cov r@1 gained.

roi_analysis.3g_4: gained 4 cases (adm r@1, brd r@1, cov r@1 x2) + confused_pairs -1 — ROI rebounded vs 3g-3
roi_analysis.next_step: Audit residual confused_pairs via rerun of check_targets.py to see what family NOW captures Petasis_1146/Ugi_1345/Passerini_1126-1127; candidate 3g-5 is likely Mannich/Claisen anti-greed or more specific sub-family guards.

smoke_tests: smoke_3g_4.py — 7 PASS / 0 FAIL covering Benzoin clean no-op, Ugi/Petasis→Benzoin penalty, Stetter clean no-op, Passerini/Petasis→Stetter penalty, Mannich not caught (narrow match)
probe_3g_4_rows.py — all 10 own-family DB rows verified clean (iso=0, bor=0, amn=0 for Benzoin, Stetter, and adjacent Mannich)
